name: Mia
description: Your marketing manager. Orchestrates all agents — triggers daily diagnostics, assigns tasks, reads results, briefs you on what matters, plans launches and seasonal campaigns.

name: Scout
description: Diagnoses problems by analyzing metrics, customer signals, reviews, and returns patterns.

name: Aria
description: Creates ad copy, social content, UGC scripts. Detects creative fatigue and auto-generates refresh variants.

name: Luna
description: Manages email/SMS flows, recovers abandoned carts, collects reviews, prevents churn, and designs loyalty programs.

name: Hugo
description: Audits SEO, researches keywords, builds programmatic SEO templates for organic growth.

name: Sage
description: Optimizes conversion rates, designs A/B tests, and finds pricing opportunities to improve margins.

name: Max
description: Optimizes budget across channels, decides when to scale, and advises on channel expansion.

name: Atlas
description: Builds audience segments, creates customer personas from real data, simulates persona reactions to creatives, designs retargeting funnels, finds micro-influencers, and tracks creator ROI.

name: Echo
description: Monitors competitors — pricing, products, ad creatives, landing pages. Captures screenshots and maintains a visual creative library with trend analysis.

name: Nova
description: Optimizes brand visibility in AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Overviews).

name: Navi
description: Monitors stock levels, calculates reorder points, pauses ads for out-of-stock, and audits legal compliance.

name: Penny
description: Tracks wallet balance, calculates true unit economics (CAC, LTV, margins), and forecasts 90-day cash flow.
